data.name: 禁忌摄影
data.detailed_description:
· This is a role-playing game.
· The player takes on the role of a photographer who runs a photography studio
· The studio receives custom photography orders from customers every day
· Players hire female models to collaborate in photo shoots, in order to earn commission
· The commissions earned can be used to improve camera, build new scenes, and hire higher grade female models
· 3D model
· Models with different styles
· Rich dress matching
· Novel photography gameplay
data.about_the_game:
· This is a role-playing game.
· The player takes on the role of a photographer who runs a photography studio
· The studio receives custom photography orders from customers every day
· Players hire female models to collaborate in photo shoots, in order to earn commission
· The commissions earned can be used to improve camera, build new scenes, and hire higher grade female models
· 3D model
· Models with different styles
· Rich dress matching
· Novel photography gameplay
data.short_description: The player plays as a photographer, owns a photography studio, and works with beautiful models to take photos according to the customized requirements of clients, in order to earn commission.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
